ZSNAP_F01S_103.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Assigns aging grid buckets based on parameter-driven day intervals, derives net due arrears days, and performs currency conversion for AP aging analysis.
ZSNAP_F01S_103.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Calculates dynamic aging buckets and performs currency conversion for open AP items
ZSNAP_F01S_103.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.DOCUMENTITEMTEXT,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCE,
	MAIN.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	case MAIN.USEREFERENCEDINVOICEDATES
		when 'X' then MAIN.NETDUEDATE
		else _REFERENCEDINVOICES."NetDueDate"
	end as NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.POSTINGDATE,
	MAIN.DOCUMENTDATE,
	MAIN.DUECALCULATIONBASEDATE,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DAYS,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1PERCENT,
	case MAIN.USEREFERENCEDINVOICEDATES
		when 'X' then MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE
		else case
			when _REFERENCEDINVOICES."CashDiscount1Percent" <> 0 then TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (TO_DATE (_REFERENCEDINVOICES."DueCalculationBaseDate", 'YYYYMMDD'), cast (_REFERENCEDINVOICES."CashDiscount1Days" as INTEGER)), 'YYYYMMDD')
			else _REFERENCEDINVOICES."NetDueDate"
		end
	end as CASHDISCOUNT1DATE,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DAYS,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2PERCENT,
	case MAIN.USEREFERENCEDINVOICEDATES
		when 'X' then MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DATE
		else case
			when _REFERENCEDINVOICES."CashDiscount2Percent" <> 0 then TO_VARCHAR (ADD_DAYS (TO_DATE (_REFERENCEDINVOICES."DueCalculationBaseDate", 'YYYYMMDD'), cast (_REFERENCEDINVOICES."CashDiscount2Days" as INTEGER)), 'YYYYMMDD')
			else _REFERENCEDINVOICES."NetDueDate"
		end
	end as CASHDISCOUNT2DATE,
	MAIN.DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE,
	case
		when MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE < TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD') and MAIN.DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE = 'X' then 'X'
		else cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1))
	end as CASHDISCOUNTMISSED,
	MAIN.PAYMENTTERMS,
	MAIN.PAYMENTBLOCKINGREASON,
	MAIN.PAYMENTMETHOD,
	MAIN.ISUSEDINPAYMENTTRANSACTION,
	MAIN.TREASURYCONTRACTTYPE,
	MAIN.POSTINGKEY,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCETYPE,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.SEGMENT,
	MAIN.PARTNERCOMPANY,
	MAIN.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.ASSIGNMENTREFERENCE,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INTC,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INBALTC,
	MAIN.BALANCETRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INCC,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INGC,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	cast (CONVERT_CURRENCY ("CLIENT" => '000', "SOURCE_UNIT" => MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY, "TARGET_UNIT" => :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, "AMOUNT" => MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY, "REFERENCE_DATE" => :P_KEYDATE, "SCHEMA" => 'HDLFS', "CONVERSION_TYPE" => :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, "STEPS" => 'shift,convert,round', "PRECISIONS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX', "CONFIGURATION_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV', "PREFACTORS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURF', "RATES_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURR') as DECIMAL(23,2)) as AMOUNTINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	cast (CONVERT_CURRENCY ("CLIENT" => '000', "SOURCE_UNIT" => MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY, "TARGET_UNIT" => :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, "AMOUNT" => MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INCC, "REFERENCE_DATE" => :P_KEYDATE, "SCHEMA" => 'HDLFS', "CONVERSION_TYPE" => :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, "STEPS" => 'shift,convert,round', "PRECISIONS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX', "CONFIGURATION_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV', "PREFACTORS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURF', "RATES_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURR') as DECIMAL(23,2)) as CASHDISCOUNT1INDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	cast (CONVERT_CURRENCY ("CLIENT" => '000', "SOURCE_UNIT" => MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY, "TARGET_UNIT" => :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, "AMOUNT" => MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INCC, "REFERENCE_DATE" => :P_KEYDATE, "SCHEMA" => 'HDLFS', "CONVERSION_TYPE" => :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, "STEPS" => 'shift,convert,round', "PRECISIONS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX', "CONFIGURATION_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV', "PREFACTORS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURF', "RATES_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURR') as DECIMAL(23,2)) as CASHDISCOUNT2INDC,
	cast (:P_DISPLAYCURRENCY as NVARCHAR(5)) as DISPLAYCURRENCY,
	
	/*@SNAP.generation.preserveField: true*/
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS as FORCEDPARAMETER1,
	
	/*@SNAP.generation.preserveField: true*/
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS as FORCEDPARAMETER2,
	
	/*@SNAP.generation.preserveField: true*/
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS as FORCEDPARAMETER3,
	
	/*@SNAP.generation.preserveField: true*/
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS as FORCEDPARAMETER4
from ZSNAP_F01S_052(:P_SIGNAGE, :P_KEYDATE) as MAIN
left outer join I_OPERATIONALACCTGDOCITEM as _REFERENCEDINVOICES on MAIN.COMPANYCODE = _REFERENCEDINVOICES."CompanyCode" and MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCE = _REFERENCEDINVOICES."AccountingDocument" and MAIN.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE = _REFERENCEDINVOICES."AccountingDocumentItem" and MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR = _REFERENCEDINVOICES."FiscalYear" and _REFERENCEDINVOICES."FinancialAccountType" = 'K' and MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY = _REFERENCEDINVOICES."AccountingDocumentCategory"
where MAIN.CLEARINGDATE > TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
	or MAIN.CLEARINGDATE = '00000000';
ZSNAP_F01S_103.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Open Items Base

ZSNAP_F01S_203.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: Filters for items cleared after P_ClearedDate and derives payment timing categories (early, on-time, late) based on clearing date vs cash discount dates and tolerance days.
ZSNAP_F01S_203.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.purpos: Processes cleared AP items and calculates early payment indicators for discount optimization
ZSNAP_F01S_203.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.DOCUMENTITEMTEXT,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCE,
	MAIN.INVOICEITEMREFERENCE,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCEFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.POSTINGDATE,
	MAIN.DOCUMENTDATE,
	MAIN.DUECALCULATIONBASEDATE,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DAYS,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1PERCENT,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DAYS,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2PERCENT,
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DATE,
	MAIN.DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE,
	case
		when MAIN.CLEARINGDATE > MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE and MAIN.DISCOUNTISAVAILABLE = 'X' then 'X'
		else cast ('' as NVARCHAR(1))
	end as CASHDISCOUNTMISSED,
	MAIN.PAYMENTTERMS,
	MAIN.PAYMENTBLOCKINGREASON,
	MAIN.PAYMENTMETHOD,
	MAIN.ISUSEDINPAYMENTTRANSACTION,
	MAIN.TREASURYCONTRACTTYPE,
	MAIN.POSTINGKEY,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	MAIN.PARTNERCOMPANY,
	MAIN.INVOICEREFERENCETYPE,
	MAIN.NETDUEDATE,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.SEGMENT,
	MAIN.PURCHASINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.ASSIGNMENTREFERENCE,
	:P_EARLYPAYMENTTOLERANCEDAYS as EARLYPAYMENTTOLERANCEDAYS,
	cast (case
		when MAIN.CLEARINGDATE <= MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE then DAYS_BETWEEN (MAIN.CLEARINGDATE, TO_DATE (MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'))
		when MAIN.CLEARINGDATE <= MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DATE then DAYS_BETWEEN (MAIN.CLEARINGDATE, TO_DATE (MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2DATE, 'YYYYMMDD'))
		else DAYS_BETWEEN (MAIN.CLEARINGDATE, MAIN.NETDUEDATE)
	end as DECIMAL(10,0)) as CLEARINGDATEVSDUEDATEOFFSET,
	cast (DAYS_BETWEEN (MAIN.NETDUEDATE, MAIN.CLEARINGDATE) as DECIMAL(10,0)) as NETDUEARREARSDAYSINT,
	cast (case
		when MAIN.CLEARINGDATE > MAIN.NETDUEDATE then DAYS_BETWEEN (MAIN.NETDUEDATE, MAIN.CLEARINGDATE)
		else 0
	end as DECIMAL(10,0)) as DAYSOVERDUEINT,
	'C' as ISCLEARED,
	cast ('A. Cleared' as NVARCHAR(50)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT,
	cast (case
		when MAIN.CLEARINGDATE >= TO_VARCHAR (ADD_MONTHS (:P_KEYDATE, -12), 'YYYYMMDD') and MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY <> MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT then 'X'
		else ''
	end as NVARCHAR(1)) as ISCLEAREDINLAST12MONTHS,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INTC,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INBALTC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'BalanceTransactionCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INBALTC,
	MAIN.BALANCETRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INCC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INCC,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INGC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INGC,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	cast (CONVERT_CURRENCY ("CLIENT" => '000', "SOURCE_UNIT" => MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY, "TARGET_UNIT" => :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, "AMOUNT" => MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY, "REFERENCE_DATE" => TO_DATE (MAIN.CLEARINGDATE), "SCHEMA" => 'HDLFS', "CONVERSION_TYPE" => :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, "STEPS" => 'shift,convert,round', "PRECISIONS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX', "CONFIGURATION_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV', "PREFACTORS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURF', "RATES_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURR') as DECIMAL(23,2)) as AMOUNTINDISPLAYCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	cast (CONVERT_CURRENCY ("CLIENT" => '000', "SOURCE_UNIT" => MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY, "TARGET_UNIT" => :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, "AMOUNT" => MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT1INCC, "REFERENCE_DATE" => TO_DATE (MAIN.CLEARINGDATE), "SCHEMA" => 'HDLFS', "CONVERSION_TYPE" => :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, "STEPS" => 'shift,convert,round', "PRECISIONS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX', "CONFIGURATION_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV', "PREFACTORS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURF', "RATES_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURR') as DECIMAL(23,2)) as CASHDISCOUNT1INDC,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'DisplayCurrency'*/
	cast (CONVERT_CURRENCY ("CLIENT" => '000', "SOURCE_UNIT" => MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY, "TARGET_UNIT" => :P_DISPLAYCURRENCY, "AMOUNT" => MAIN.CASHDISCOUNT2INCC, "REFERENCE_DATE" => TO_DATE (MAIN.CLEARINGDATE), "SCHEMA" => 'HDLFS', "CONVERSION_TYPE" => :P_EXCHANGERATETYPE, "STEPS" => 'shift,convert,round', "PRECISIONS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURX', "CONFIGURATION_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURV', "PREFACTORS_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURF', "RATES_TABLE" => 'SAP.CURRENCY.VIEW.TCURR') as DECIMAL(23,2)) as CASHDISCOUNT2INDC,
	cast (:P_DISPLAYCURRENCY as NVARCHAR(5)) as DISPLAYCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_052(:P_SIGNAGE, :P_KEYDATE) as MAIN
where MAIN.CLEARINGDATE <= TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
	and MAIN.CLEARINGDATE > TO_VARCHAR (:P_CLEAREDDATE, 'YYYYMMDD')
	and MAIN.CLEARINGDATE <> '00000000';
ZSNAP_F01S_203.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F01: Cleared Items Base

ZSNAP_F01S_F72060.@DataWarehouse.businessDefinition.descri: SNAP F72: Duplicate Activity for Balances
ZSNAP_F01S_F72060.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENT,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODE,
	MAIN.FISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.LEDGER,
	MAIN.LEDGERGLLINEITEM,
	MAIN.SOURCELEDGER,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTTYPE,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTCATEGORY,
	MAIN.ACCOUNTINGDOCUMENTITEM,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRY,
	MAIN.CLEARINGJOURNALENTRYFISCALYEAR,
	MAIN.CLEARINGDATE,
	MAIN.SPECIALGLCODE,
	MAIN.BUSINESSAREA,
	MAIN.CHARTOFACCOUNTS,
	MAIN.CONTROLLINGAREA,
	MAIN.COSTCENTER,
	MAIN.DEBITCREDITCODE,
	MAIN.FINANCIALACCOUNTTYPE,
	MAIN.FUNCTIONALAREA,
	MAIN.GLACCOUNT,
	MAIN.PROFITCENTER,
	BALANCEPERIODS.FISCALPERIOD as SPECIALPERIOD,
	BALANCEPERIODS.FISCALYEARPERIOD,
	MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT,
	BALANCEPERIODS.FISCALPERIODENDDATE,
	MAIN.SUPPLIER,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'TransactionCurrency'*/
	cast (MAIN.AMOUNTINTRANSACTIONCURRENCY as DECIMAL(23,2)) as ENDINGBALANCEAMTINTRANSCRCY,
	MAIN.TRANSACTIONCURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'CompanyCodeCurrency'*/
	cast (MAIN.AMOUNTINCOMPANYCODECURRENCY as DECIMAL(23,2)) as ENDINGBALANCEAMTINCOCODECRCY,
	MAIN.COMPANYCODECURRENCY,
	
	/*@Semantics.amount.currencyCode: 'GlobalCurrency'*/
	cast (MAIN.AMOUNTINGLOBALCURRENCY as DECIMAL(23,2)) as ENDINGBALANCEAMTINGLOBALCRCY,
	MAIN.GLOBALCURRENCY
from ZSNAP_F01S_F72055(:P_SFROMFISCALYEAR, :P_STOFISCALYEARPERIOD) as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01S_F72056 (
	:P_SFROMFISCALYEAR,
	:P_STOFISCALYEARPERIOD
) as BALANCEPERIODS on MAIN.FISCALYEARVARIANT = BALANCEPERIODS.FISCALYEARVARIANT and MAIN.FISCALYEAR = BALANCEPERIODS.FISCALYEAR and MAIN.FISCALPERIOD <= BALANCEPERIODS.FISCALPERIOD
where MAIN.ISSTARTINGBALANCERELEVANT = 'X';
ZSNAP_F01S_F72060.@EndUserText.label: SNAP F72: Duplicate Activity for Balances

ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL0.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	cast ('D. Overdue' as NVARCHAR(40)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 0 and MAIN."CalendarDate" < INTERVALS.KEYDATE
union all select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	cast ('C. Due on Key Date' as NVARCHAR(40)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 0 and MAIN."CalendarDate" = INTERVALS.KEYDATE
union all select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	cast ('B. Not Yet Due' as NVARCHAR(40)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 0 and MAIN."CalendarDate" > INTERVALS.KEYDATE;
ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL0.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: 0 Interval Net Due Buckets

ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL1.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	cast ('F. More than' || ' ' || cast (:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS as NVARCHAR(20)) || ' ' || 'Overdue' as NVARCHAR(40)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 1 and MAIN."CalendarDate" < INTERVALS.INTERVAL1MINUSDATE
union all select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	'E. Less than' || ' ' || cast (:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS as NVARCHAR(20)) || ' ' || 'Overdue' as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 1 and MAIN."CalendarDate" >= INTERVALS.INTERVAL1MINUSDATE and MAIN."CalendarDate" < INTERVALS.KEYDATE
union all select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	cast ('D. Due on Key Date' as NVARCHAR(40)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 1 and MAIN."CalendarDate" = INTERVALS.KEYDATE
union all select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	'C. Due within' || ' ' || cast (:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS as NVARCHAR(20)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 1 and MAIN."CalendarDate" > INTERVALS.KEYDATE and MAIN."CalendarDate" <= INTERVALS.INTERVAL1PLUSDATE
union all select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	'B. Due in over' || ' ' || cast (:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS as NVARCHAR(20)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL1INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL3INDAYS,
	:P_NETDUEINTERVAL4INDAYS
) as INTERVALS on INTERVALS.NUMBEROFINTERVALS = 1 and MAIN."CalendarDate" > INTERVALS.INTERVAL1PLUSDATE;
ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL1.@EndUserText.label: SNAP: 1 Interval Net Due Buckets

ZSNAP_F01G_NETDUEINTERVAL2.@DataWarehouse.tableFunction.script:
return select
	MAIN."CalendarDate" as NETDUEDATE,
	cast ('H. More than' || ' ' || cast (:P_NETDUEINTERVAL2INDAYS as NVARCHAR(20)) || ' ' || 'Overdue' as NVARCHAR(40)) as NETDUEINTERVALTEXT
from I_CALENDARDATE as MAIN
inner join ZSNAP_F01G_INTERVALSIZING (
	TO_VARCHAR (:P_KEYDATE, 'YYYYMMDD'),
